candidate_definition_hints.text: This repo is an unofficial implementation of the **[Dreamer 4](https://danijar.com/project/dreamer4/)** world model and RL agent from *“Training Agents Inside of Scalable World Models”* in pure JAX. This repo is designed to be educational and serve as a starting point for those …
